workflow_runs.name: CI/CD — TravelPlatform
workflow_runs.display_title: fix: exclude .agents from Vite watcher to prevent EBUSY crash

head_commit.message:
fix: exclude .agents from Vite watcher to prevent EBUSY crash

The .agents/skills/firebase-data-connect/examples.md file is locked by
OneDrive sync. Added server.watch.ignored to skip .agents/, dist/, .git/.
Also added .agents/ to .gitignore — it's IDE tooling, not project source.

workflow_runs.name: CI/CD — TravelPlatform
workflow_runs.display_title: fix: add @tailwindcss/vite plugin + rewrite CSS with @utility directive

head_commit.message:
fix: add @tailwindcss/vite plugin + rewrite CSS with @utility directive

Critical fix: Tailwind v4 requires @tailwindcss/vite Vite plugin (was missing).
- Install @tailwindcss/vite 4.x
- Add tailwindcss() as first plugin in vite.config.ts
- Rewrite src/index.css using @utility directive for all custom classes
  (card, glass, btn-primary, btn-secondary, btn-ghost, input-base, badge,
   gradient-brand, gradient-hero, animate-* etc.)
- @utility registers classes in Tailwind's JIT so JSX can use them
- Zero build warnings. CSS output: 42KB (full utility generation)
- Inter font, dark gradient, glassmorphism all verified in browser

Build: 1812 modules | Tests: 40/40 | TypeScript: 0 errors

workflow_runs.name: CI/CD — TravelPlatform
workflow_runs.display_title: feat: complete TravelPlatform v1.0 - AI-driven multi-tenant PWA

head_commit.message:
feat: complete TravelPlatform v1.0 - AI-driven multi-tenant PWA

- Vite + React 18 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS v4
- Graphify-inspired semantic extraction engine (40 unit tests passing)
- 8 full feature pages: Itinerary, Tasks, Chat, Expenses, Locations, Translate, AI, Settings
- Firestore multi-tenant security rules (admin/editor/viewer roles)
- Zustand stores: auth, trip, AI with offline mutation queue
- Multi-provider AI: Gemini, OpenAI, Anthropic, Ollama
- Hebrew-first i18n (RTL default) + English support
- PWA with Workbox offline caching
- GitHub Actions CI/CD -> GitHub Pages static deploy
- 5-step onboarding wizard with AI booking extraction
- Voice dictation, receipt scanning, menu analyzer, flight tracker
- TypeScript strict mode: 0 errors | Tests: 40/40
